description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a smooth, light gray tabletop and a thin, slightly exposed wooden edge. The desk is supported by four slender, black metal legs, each positioned at the corners for stability. The tabletop appears to be made of a laminate or composite material, providing a durable and easy-to-clean surface. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible drawers, shelves, or additional features. The legs are cylindrical and likely made of steel, giving the desk a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. This desk is suitable for collaborative workspaces, classrooms, or meeting areas in urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a light gray laminate top, exposed wooden edge, and four black metal legs, offering a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the narrow end, highlighting the slim tabletop and two front legs.
description_view_1: The desk is viewed from the long side, showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end is visible, mirroring the view of the first end with two legs in view.
description_view_3: The opposite long side is shown, again displaying the full tabletop and all four legs.
attribute_orientation: The long side of the desk, intended for user access, is the front, with the tabletop surface facing upward and the four legs at the corners providing support.
